title.en: Ye Xingchen was impacting in this abyss.

content.en:
"Father, I'm going to attack the Ultimate Lord Realm!"

Ye Xingchen was impacting in this abyss.

Soon.

He easily tore through the bottleneck, completely completed the ultimate, his body became the ultimate, and his strength skyrocketed.

"Let's go, let's go back to the multidimensional realm, you have broken through to the ultimate master and embarked on the path of the abyssal star ultimate system, and then you will focus your time on the ultimate system of the extradimensional realm. Ye Tian said.

"Father, why do you want to spend time on the ultimate system of the extradimensional realm?"

Ye Xingchen didn't understand it.

"Because the Abyss Star Ultimate System only has one quota for breaking through to the Ultimate Realm Master, but the Transcendent Realm Ultimate System has many quotas, and it can even be said that there is no limit to the number of places. Although the Extreme Realm System of the Extradimensional Realm is very ordinary, there is hope that you will break through to become the Ultimate Realm Master. Ye Tian explained.

"I see!"

Ye Xingchen understood.

"Of course, the Yuanxing Ultimate System, you can use it as a concurrent cultivation!" Ye Tian said: "I will pass on to you the complete Yuanxing Ultimate System, and the Yuanxing Cultivation System will make your ~ combat effectiveness skyrocket." "

"Yes, Father!"

Ye Xingchen responded.

After that, Ye Tian passed on the complete Abyss Ultimate System to Ye Xingchen.

......

With the help of the Yuanxing Ultimate System, Ye Xingchen cultivated extremely easily on the path of the Transcendent Realm Ultimate System, and he easily raised his cultivation to the Nine Realms Peak-Realm.

Now, Ye Xingchen has mastered an ultimate dimensional killing move, and his strength is definitely no less than that of the Void Immortal Realm Lord.

And Ye Tian also let Ye Xingchen join the Void Heaven Palace, so that Ye Xingchen could also use the Void Heaven Palace to descend to other dimensional heavens and earths to create more ultimate dimensional killing moves and sharpen himself.

Soon.

Many powerhouses at the peak of the Nine Realms in the Void Heaven Palace knew that the human race had mastered the Yuanxing Ultimate System, and they were also very envious.

After all, if this continues, the human race will definitely give birth to some Nine Realm Peaks who have mastered the ultimate dimensional killing moves, and that will be a very large force.

this day.

The Void Immortal Realm Lord found Ye Tian.

"Ye Tian Realm Lord. The Void Immortal Realm Lord asked with a very gentle attitude: "I want to cultivate the Yuanxing Ultimate System, is it possible?"

"Void Immortal Realm Lord, why do you want to cultivate the Abyssal Star Ultimate System? I don't know if you know that the Abyssal Star Ultimate System only allows one Ultimate Realm Lord to be born, and I want to use the Abyssal Star Ultimate System to enter the Realm Master Realm. Ye said.

"I know!" said the Void Immortal Realm Lord: "I don't expect to be able to break through to the Ultimate Realm Lord by relying on the Abyss Ultimate System, I just want to use the Abyss Ultimate System to improve my physical body and increase my strength." My strength is too weak, and I am very weak in the Dimensional Sea, and it is easy to fall into the Dimensional Sea. So, I want to improve. However, my progress in the Transcendental Realm Ultimate System is too slow, and it is far from me to create a second Ultimate Dimension Killing Move. "

Seeing that Ye Tian was silent, the Lord of the Void Immortal Realm said: "I will pay for it, I have descended into many dimensional heaven and earth, and I have obtained a lot of ultimate dimensional killing moves, some of which are allowed to be taught, and I will use these ultimate dimensional killing moves as a reward." "

"Good!"

Ye Tian agreed.

It wasn't that he fell in love with those ultimate dimensional killing moves, but the Void Immortal Realm Lord brought him to join the Void Heaven Palace, otherwise, he wouldn't have grown so fast.

That's why he agreed.

But the other Nine Realms peak existences, if they want to go through the Abyss Star Ultimate System, unless they go to the Enlightenment themselves, he won't help.

Afterwards.

Ye Tian gave the Void Immortal Realm Lord a part of the Yuanxing Ultimate System inheritance, but did not give her a complete inheritance.

Anyway, the Void Immortal Realm Lord just wants to improve his strength and let him cultivate to the Abyss Ultimate Ultimate System at the Ultimate Lord level, there is no need to give a complete Abyss Star Ultimate System.

In addition, he also needs the Void Immortal Realm Lord to make an ultimate oath and not allow it to spread.

this day.

Ye Tian took the Void Immortal Realm Lord into the Abyss Heaven and Earth, and only by entering here could the Void Immortal Realm Lord be able to cultivate the Abyssal Star Ultimate System faster, and there was hope to create the Ultimate Dimensional Killing Moves of the Abyss Star Ultimate System.

In the days that followed, the Lord of the Void Immortal Realm cultivated in the Abyss Heaven and Earth, and it was estimated that it would take a long time before he could hope to grow up.

After all, she doesn't have the talent of Yuanzhi, and her growth efficiency is naturally slow, that is, her cultivation is extremely high, otherwise she won't be able to take this path at all.

......

"There is one more thing that needs to be dealt with, I am now cultivating higher and higher, and I have already felt the impact of the Ultimate Oath, and I must deal with it!"

The thing that Ye Tian had to deal with was that he had accepted the inheritance of the Ultimate Dimensional Killing Moves of the Lord of the Heavenly Vines in the Divine Dimension Heaven and Earth, and he had to avenge him.

Ask for flowers

Now, his strength is extremely strong, and it is okay to help him take revenge.

Ye Tian kept shuttling and going, heading to the Divine Dimension Heaven and Earth.

According to the information left by the Lord of the Heavenly Vine, he was severely injured by another Ultimate Lord of the Divine Dimension, and then encountered the Ultimate Creature, and then he was on the verge of death.

Therefore, revenge is naturally to find the ultimate lord.

And the name of that ultimate lord is the Lord of Flame Zero, Ye Tian doesn't know what strength he is, but he shouldn't be his opponent.

Even in the entire Shenwei Heaven and Earth, there should be no strong people.

It didn't take long for Ye Tian to arrive at the side of the Divine Dimension Heaven and Earth, and then casually attacked the Divine Dimension Heaven and Earth, waiting for the ultimate masters of the Divine Dimension Heaven and Earth to rush over.

This time, the Ultimate Lords moved quickly.

Whew!!!

One after another, figures came across the sea of dimensions, instantly enveloping Ye Tian.

"What is Your Excellency and what do you want to do?"

One of the ultimate lords asked.

Looking at these ultimate masters in front of him, Ye Tian showed his aura slightly.

Rumble!!!

The terrifying aura power made these ultimate lords tremble, as if they couldn't move.

"Unbeatable!"

That's what they're thinking at the moment.

"Do you know the Lord of Flame Zero?"

Ye Tian asked.

These Ultimate Lords realized that Ye Tian might have an enmity with the Lord of Flame Zero, and they were afraid that they would be killed, so they immediately said, "We are not familiar with the Lord of Flame Zero!"

"Tell me, where is he?"

Ye Tian asked.

One of the Ultimate Lords immediately revealed the whereabouts of the Lord of Flame Zero, and Ye Tian immediately went to that location.

After seeing Ye Tian leave, these ultimate lords breathed a sigh of relief.

"Who the hell is this, what a terrifying strength!"

"I don't know, there are too many powerhouses in the Sea of Dimensions, and we haven't seen each other, where do we know each other!"

"The Lord of Flame Zero won't be killed by this one, will he?"

"Could it be that you still want to save the Lord of Flame Zero?"

"Forget it, the Lord of Flame Zero is usually too arrogant, I guess I inadvertently provoked a big enemy!"

While they were discussing, Ye Tian gradually approached the place where the Flame Zero Land was located.
